content.description:
The kernel's main composition module and entry point. Exports the `loadKernel(require, storageBackend)` function which loads all kernel subsystems and returns the `Kernel` class.

## Responsibilities

- **Seed IDs**: Defines well-known GUIDs for foundational items (ATOM, TYPE_DEFINITION, CODE, etc.) and event types
- **Event Bus**: Provides type-hierarchy-aware event dispatch (`api.events.on/off/emit`)
- **Boot Sequence**: Initializes storage, applies styles, sets up error handlers, renders viewport
- **REPL API**: Creates the comprehensive API object available in renderers and the REPL console
- **Item Operations**: Parent-child management, cycle detection, deletion with cleanup
- **Declarative Watches**: Dispatches events to code items that declare `content.watches`
- **Error Capture**: Emits `error-event` events and shows fallback UI when handlers fail

## Key Exports

- `loadKernel(require, storageBackend)` - Async factory returning `Kernel` class

## Dependencies

- [kernel:storage](item://33333333-2222-0000-0000-000000000000)
- [kernel:module-system](item://33333333-4444-0000-0000-000000000000)
- [kernel:rendering](item://33333333-5555-0000-0000-000000000000)
- [kernel:safe-mode](item://33333333-7777-0000-0000-000000000000)

## Key Implementation Patterns

- [Cycle-Safe Traversal](item://c0c0c0c0-0013-0000-0000-000000000000) — Used in `wouldCreateCycle()`, `hasCycle()`, and event type chain building
- [Silent Update Pattern](item://c0c0c0c0-0010-0000-0000-000000000000) — `api.set()` vs `api.update()` distinction originates here
- [Type Chain Validation](item://c0c0c0c0-0014-0000-0000-000000000000) — Delegated to storage on every `saveItem()`

## See Also

- [Event System](item://c0c0c0c0-0006-0000-0000-000000000000) — Declarative watches and event dispatch
- [Error Handling](item://c0c0c0c0-0023-0000-0000-000000000000) — Three-tier error system with `captureError()`
- [Import/Export System](item://c0c0c0c0-0027-0000-0000-000000000000) — Topological sort, hot-reload logic

loadKernel.EventBus.name: EventBus
loadKernel.EventBus.description:
Event bus with hierarchical type dispatch.
Subscribing to a parent event type (e.g., ITEM_EVENT) receives all child events.

EventBus.on.name: on
EventBus.on.description: Subscribe to an event type. Returns an unsubscribe function.

params.name: eventTypeId
params.description: Event type GUID to subscribe to

params.name: handler
params.description: Called with event object {type, content, timestamp}

EventBus.off.name: off
EventBus.off.description: Unsubscribe a handler from an event type.

EventBus.emit.name: emit
EventBus.emit.description: Emit an event, dispatching to all matching subscribers (including parent types).

EventBus.emitAsync.name: emitAsync
EventBus.emitAsync.description: Get all event type GUIDs that have active listeners.

loadKernel.sortItemsForImport.name: sortItemsForImport
loadKernel.sortItemsForImport.description:
Sort items in dependency order for import (types before their instances).
Uses topological sort based on type and extends fields.

loadKernel.Kernel.name: Kernel
loadKernel.Kernel.description: Core kernel — manages storage, events, and the unified API.

Kernel.boot.name: boot
Kernel.boot.description: Initialize the kernel: storage, seed items, event cache, watches, and first render.

Kernel.ensureSeedItems.name: ensureSeedItems
Kernel.ensureSeedItems.description: Verify seed items exist in storage (warns if missing).

Kernel.buildEventTypeCache.name: buildEventTypeCache
Kernel.buildEventTypeCache.description:
Build a cache mapping event type IDs to their ancestor chains and names.
Also builds the watcher index for efficient event dispatch.

Kernel.getTypeChain.name: getTypeChain
Kernel.getTypeChain.description: Get the full type chain from an item up to atom.

Kernel.applyStyles.name: applyStyles
Kernel.applyStyles.description: Load and apply kernel CSS styles from the kernel:styles item.

Kernel.saveJson.name: saveJson
Kernel.saveJson.description: Download an object as a JSON file.

Kernel.export.name: export
Kernel.export.description: Export all items as JSON download(s).

params.name: singleFile
params.description: =true] - Single backup file or one per item

Kernel.createAPI.name: createAPI
Kernel.createAPI.description: Create the unified API object. When containerItem is provided, adds context-specific methods.

params.name: containerItem
params.description: The item being rendered (adds context methods)

api.get.name: get
api.get.description: Retrieve an item by ID from storage.

api.set.name: set
api.set.description: Save or insert an item. Emits item:created or item:updated events.

params.name: item
params.description: The item to save (must have an id)

params.name: options
params.description: .silent] - If true, suppress events and re-render

api.update.name: update
api.update.description: Save an item (alias for set — reactivity handles re-render).

api.updateSilent.name: updateSilent
api.updateSilent.description: Save without events or re-render (for layout/position saves).

api.delete.name: delete
api.delete.description: Delete an item, detaching from all parents. Emits item:deleted.

api.deleteByPrefix.name: deleteByPrefix
api.deleteByPrefix.description:
Batch-delete all items whose ID starts with prefix.
Skips per-item events — does one cache clear + render at the end.

params.name: prefix
params.description: ID prefix to match (e.g., nested instance prefix)

api.query.name: query
api.query.description: Find items matching a filter object (key-value pairs matched against item fields).

api.getAll.name: getAll
api.getAll.description: Get all items (excludes nested instance items).

api.getAllRaw.name: getAllRaw
api.getAllRaw.description: Get all items including nested instance items.

api.require.name: require
api.require.description: Load a library or code module by name or ID.

api.typeChainIncludes.name: typeChainIncludes
api.typeChainIncludes.description: Check if a type's inheritance chain includes a target type.

params.name: targetId
params.description: The target type to look for in the chain

api.attach.name: attach
api.attach.description:
Attach a child item to a parent.
1-arg form (in view context): attach(itemId) — uses containerItem as parent.
2-arg form: attach(parentId, itemId).

api.detach.name: detach
api.detach.description:
Detach a child from a parent.
1-arg form (in view context): detach(itemId) — uses containerItem as parent.
2-arg form: detach(parentId, itemId).

api.findContainerOf.name: findContainerOf
api.findContainerOf.description: Find the parent item that contains a given item in its attachments.

returns.description: The parent item, or null if not attached

api.wouldCreateCycle.name: wouldCreateCycle
api.wouldCreateCycle.description: Check if attaching an item as a child would create a cycle.

api.hasCycle.name: hasCycle
api.hasCycle.description: Check if an item's descendant graph contains any cycles.

api.export.name: export
api.export.description: Export all items as JSON download(s).

params.name: singleFile
params.description: =true] - If true, one backup file; if false, one file per item

api.import.name: import
api.import.description:
Import items from JSON file(s) with smart refresh.
Opens a file picker, then imports items with dependency-order sorting.

returns.type: Promise<{created: number, updated: number, skipped: number, action: string

api.events.name: events
api.events.description: Event system — subscribe, unsubscribe, emit, and list events.

api.events.on.name: on
api.events.on.description: Subscribe to an event type. Returns an unsubscribe function.

api.events.off.name: off
api.events.off.description: Unsubscribe a handler from an event type.

api.events.emit.name: emit
api.events.emit.description: Emit an event to all matching subscribers.

api.events.list.name: list
api.events.list.description: List all event type GUIDs that have active listeners.

api.createREPLContext.name: createREPLContext
api.createREPLContext.description: Create a context-free API object (for REPL use).

api.IDS.name: IDS
api.IDS.description: Well-known item GUIDs (ITEM, TYPE_DEFINITION, CODE, VIEW, etc.).

api.EVENT_IDS.name: EVENT_IDS
api.EVENT_IDS.description: Well-known event type GUIDs (ITEM_CREATED, ITEM_UPDATED, SYSTEM_ERROR, etc.).

api.getInstanceId.name: getInstanceId
api.getInstanceId.description: Get the nested instance ID (null for main instance).

api.isDebugMode.name: isDebugMode
api.isDebugMode.description: Check if debug mode is active.

api.helpers.name: helpers
api.helpers.description: Convenience helpers for common item operations.

returns.description: The first matching item, or null

api.helpers.listByType.name: listByType
api.helpers.listByType.description: List all items of a given type.

api.helpers.createType.name: createType
api.helpers.createType.description: Create a new type definition item.

Kernel.attach.name: attach
Kernel.attach.description: Attach a child item to a parent's attachments array.

params.name: childIdOrObj
params.description: Child GUID string, or attachment object { id, view? }

Kernel.detach.name: detach
Kernel.detach.description: Detach a child item from a parent's attachments array.

Kernel.findContainerOf.name: findContainerOf
Kernel.findContainerOf.description: Find the parent item that contains a given item in its attachments.

Kernel.wouldCreateCycle.name: wouldCreateCycle
Kernel.wouldCreateCycle.description: Check if attaching newChildId under parentId would create a cycle.

Kernel.hasCycle.name: hasCycle
Kernel.hasCycle.description: Check if an item's descendant graph contains any cycles.

Kernel.importItems.name: importItems
Kernel.importItems.description: Import items with dependency-order sorting and smart refresh.

params.name: items
params.description: Array of item objects to import

returns.type: Promise<{created: number, updated: number, skipped: number, action: string

Kernel.deleteItem.name: deleteItem
Kernel.deleteItem.description: Delete an item: detach from all parents, remove from storage, emit item:deleted.

Kernel.isCodeItem.name: isCodeItem
Kernel.isCodeItem.description: Check if an item is a code item (its type chain includes CODE).

Kernel.saveItem.name: saveItem
Kernel.saveItem.description: Save an item to storage, emitting created/updated events.

Kernel.setupDeclarativeWatches.name: setupDeclarativeWatches
Kernel.setupDeclarativeWatches.description: Subscribe a single root listener that dispatches all events to declarative watchers.

Kernel.dispatchToWatchers.name: dispatchToWatchers
Kernel.dispatchToWatchers.description: Dispatch an event to all matching declarative watch handlers.

Kernel.evaluateWatchFilter.name: evaluateWatchFilter
Kernel.evaluateWatchFilter.description: Evaluate a watch's filter conditions against an item.

params.name: item
params.description: The item affected by the event

Kernel.callWatchHandler.name: callWatchHandler
Kernel.callWatchHandler.description: Load a watcher's module and call the derived handler (e.g., onItemUpdated).

Kernel.eventToHandlerName.name: eventToHandlerName
Kernel.eventToHandlerName.description: Convert an event name to a handler function name (e.g., "item:deleted" → "onItemDeleted").

Kernel.captureError.name: captureError
Kernel.captureError.description: Capture an error and emit it as a system error event.

Kernel.showFallbackErrorUI.name: showFallbackErrorUI
Kernel.showFallbackErrorUI.description: Show a persistent error banner at the top of the page (last-resort fallback).

Kernel.reloadKernel.name: reloadKernel
Kernel.reloadKernel.description: Clean up global handlers and trigger a full kernel reload via postMessage.
